en: INTERVIEW - “This winter’s avalanche situation has nothing to do with climate change.” An unusually large number of snow sports enthusiasts died in the Alps this winter. The reason is the so-called old snow problem, says Jürg Schweizer, head of the Institute for Snow and Avalanche Research. One can count oneself lucky that there were no more victims...
la: CONLOQUIUM - "Hiemalis NIVIS CASUS nihil habet cum mutatione climatis." In Alpibus hac hieme maior numerus ludis nivalibus fanaticus mortuus est. Causa problema nix vetus sic dicta est, dicit Jürg Schweizer, caput Instituti Nivis et Investigationis Avalanche. Numerare se felicem potest quod victimae nullae erant.

la: sweatpants and sneakers: Hikers haerere in nive et eripi. Die Untersberg, discipulus in nive madens haesit. In Schönjöchl tres iuvenes in sneakers ab helicopteris liberandi sunt.
